rulings.Case Title: VICTOR TUNG VS. AMI QI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Plaintiff'S Claims In The Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 22, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT MAUREEN DULLEA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Plaintiff'S Claims In The Second Amended Complaint Defendant's Motion for Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Defendant failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). ("¿ the specific cause of action, affirmative defense, claims for damages, or issues of duty must be stated specifically in the notice of motion and be repeated, verbatim, in the separate statement of undisputed material facts"). Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Defendant failed to shift it burden, or on the alternative there is a triable issue of fact re: waiver. Fact 37. Defendants relies on evidence that has not been provided to the Court, specifically no Exhibit 40 to Tung Deposition has been attached to the filed or to the courtesy copy of Evidence is Support of Motion. The document purportedly contained in Exhibit 40 is attached to RJN Exhibit 2 to Exhibit 3, but is not cited in support of this fact. Even if the Court considers this document, there is a triable issue of fact regarding the waiver purportedly accomplished by it. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VICTOR TUNG VS. AMI QI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Chicago Title Companys Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication As To The Eighth And Ninth Causes Of Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 22, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT CHICAGO TITLE COMPANY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Motion For Summary Judgment, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication As To The Eighth And Ninth Causes Of Action Defendant's Motion for Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Defendant failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). ("¿ the specific cause of action, affirmative defense, claims for damages, or issues of duty must be stated specifically in the notice of motion and be repeated, verbatim, in the separate statement of undisputed material facts"). Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Triable issue of fact regarding waiver of escrow instruction. MF 18, 20. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TERANCE BAGBY et al VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY, A PUBLIC ENTITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 22, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT THYSSENKRUPP ELEVATOR CORP.'s DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. I.Demurrer to the causes of action for Unruh and UCL violations is sustained without leave to amend. Non-opposition filed. Demurrer to cause of action for Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress is sustained without leave to amend. No outrageous conduct alleged and no possibility of amendment suggested. II.Demurer to the cause of action for leer abuse is sustained with leave to amend to allege all elements of financial elder abuse cause of action. III.Demurer is overruled as to (1) nuisance - this cause of action is sufficiently alleged and Defendant is improperly raising issues of fact ("TKE diligently attempted to keep the elevators operational in accordance with the terms of its limited contract" Reply 2: 19-20); (2) negligence - this cause of action sufficiently alleges injury/damage to persons and property; (3) FEHA violation - this cause of action is sufficiently alleged. Govt's Code 12955(k) and 12927(c)(1). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HOTEL ESSEX, LP VS. WENDY WESTMAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 22, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT WENDY WESTMAN's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall pay all the amounts due through the end of February no later that February 23, 2016.
